name: monkeybars
description: Repo-backed phase/task workflow commands for agentic coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Durable phase/task workflow commands for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: MonkeyBars helps coding agents handle greenfield builds, brownfield rescue, and post-v1 iteration by turning repo context into plans, phases, tasks, reviewable commits, and handoffs. It is command-first; optional advisory hooks can run deterministic checks but never commit, stash, or mutate workflow state.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this is a context boundary.
